posts.author: RonnieRose23 (Sherron)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Vibrant color highlights for rows and items in groups

What are you trying to achieve

I would love the option to add vibrant colors, similar to that of a status change, in conditional color for boards. It would be great for grouping items (and rows) as well as viewing information at a glance. The current pastel highlight colors run together and don’t separate rows and items enough.
